title: Ophthalmic Laboratory Technicians
description: Cut, grind, and polish eyeglasses, contact lenses, or other precision optical elements. Assemble and mount lenses into frames or process other optical elements. Includes precision lens polishers or grinders, centerer-edgers, and lens mounters.

tasks.text: Mount and secure lens blanks or optical lenses in holding tools or chucks of cutting, polishing, grinding, or coating machines.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inspect lens blanks to detect flaws, verify smoothness of surface, and ensure thickness of coating on lenses.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Set up machines to polish, bevel, edge, or grind lenses, flats, blanks, or other precision optical elements.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inspect, weigh, and measure mounted or unmounted lenses after completion to verify alignment and conformance to specifications, using precision instruments.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Shape lenses appropriately so that they can be inserted into frames.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean finished lenses and eyeglasses, using cloths and solvents.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Mount, secure, and align finished lenses in frames or optical assemblies, using precision hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Examine prescriptions, work orders, or broken or used eyeglasses to determine specifications for lenses, contact lenses, or other optical elements.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Adjust lenses and frames to correct alignment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Select lens blanks, molds, tools, and polishing or grinding wheels, according to production specifications.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Position and adjust cutting tools to specified curvature, dimensions, and depth of cut.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Assemble eyeglass frames and attach shields, nose pads, and temple pieces, using pliers, screwdrivers, and drills.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Set dials and start machines to polish lenses or hold lenses against rotating wheels to polish them manually.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Repair broken parts, using precision hand tools and soldering irons.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Immerse eyeglass frames in solutions to harden, soften, or dye frames.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Lay out lenses and trace lens outlines on glass, using templates.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Control equipment that coats lenses to alter their reflective qualities.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Remove lenses from molds and separate lenses in containers for further processing or storage.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
